inputs.label: Retirement Age
inputs.businessContext: Age at which you plan to retire.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age at which you plan to retire.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter, in dem Sie in Rente gehen möchten
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge auquel vous prévoyez de prendre votre retraite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad a la que planea jubilarse.

inputs.label: Current Pension Savings
inputs.businessContext: Total amount already saved in your pension fund.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total amount already saved in your pension fund.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emeklilik fonunuzda halihazırda biriktirilmiş toplam tutar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtbetrag, der bereits in Ihrem Rentenfonds gespart wurde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant total déjà épargné dans votre fonds de retraite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad total ya ahorrada en su fondo de pensión.

inputs.label: Monthly Contribution
inputs.businessContext: Amount you contribute to your pension each month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount you contribute to your pension each month.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emekliliğinize her ay katkıda bulunduğunuz tutar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betrag, den Sie monatlich in Ihre Rente einzahlen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant que vous cotisez à votre retraite chaque mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad que aporta a su pensión cada mes.

inputs.label: Expected Annual Return
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual return rate on your pension investments.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual return rate on your pension investments.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emeklilik yatırımlarınızda beklenen yıllık getiri oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de rendement annuel attendu sur vos investissements retraite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de rendimiento anual esperada de sus inversiones de pensión.

inputs.label: Expected Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation rate to adjust for real values.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual inflation rate to adjust for real values.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Reel değerleri ayarlamak için beklenen yıllık enflasyon oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Inflationsrate zur Anpassung an reale Werte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'inflation annuel attendu pour ajuster les valeurs réelles.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de inflación anual esperada para ajustar a valores reales.
